title: Fiery Molten Croatian Lamb Wrap
description: A halal-friendly Croatian dish featuring lamb, Branston pickle, and a molten cheese center, all wrapped in a ssam-style wrap, perfect for a festive dinner
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb strips to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat and cook the lamb strips until browned, about 5 minutes.
In a separate pan, warm the ssam wraps over medium heat for 2 minutes on each side.
Assemble the wraps by spreading a quarter of the Branston pickle on each wrap, followed by a quarter of the cooked lamb and a quarter of the mozzarella cheese.
Place the wraps on a baking sheet and bake for 5 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the wraps from the oven and let cool for 2 minutes before serving.
Serve the wraps hot, garnished with additional Branston pickle if desired.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
